items.name_en: CHANEL 24a hobo This season❤️‍🔥❤️‍🔥 this hobo is a must-have! Extremely lightweight! It fits almost everything you need, including your phone! Compared to previous hobo bags, this one has a fuller shape. The leather is oil-waxed patent leather.⛅️⛅️ The shoulder strap length is sufficient and it holds up well with heavy autumn/winter clothes! It might look average in photos, but once you touch the real thing and try it on, you'll love it! Black is very stable! The brown coffee color has a particularly retro vibe!
